---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest a new skill or rule
labels: enhancement
---

**What should the skill do?**

**When would you use it?**
(e.g., "Every time I finish a feature", "When I'm stuck on a bug")

**What does the output look like?**
(e.g., "A report in chat", "An HTML page", "A commit")

**Anything else?**
